underlying_goal: Run the gsdr discuss-phase and plan-phase workflow for Phase 55.2 (Codex Runtime Substrate), then capture a signal about workflow friction observed
friction_detail: Claude did not auto-proceed from discuss-phase to plan-phase when --auto flag was set, requiring user to prompt continuation
brief_summary: User ran gsdr workflow commands for Phase 55.2 planning; Claude completed the work but failed to auto-chain phases, prompting the user to file a signal about flag scoping ambiguity.
